SS2_NEMBANDIT_DESCRIPTION: Nemesis Bandit carefully positions himself per camouflage technology ad wrangle hostes et cull turbas. \n\n<color=#CCD3E0>< ! > Show no mercy.
SS2_NEMBANDIT_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abiit, cum absolute nullis paenitentiis.
SS2_NEMBANDIT_PRIMARY_DESCRIPTION: Puga revolver shot pro <style=cIsDamage>220% vulnere</style>. Potest habere usque ad 6 bullets.
SS2_NEMBANDIT_SPECIAL_DESCRIPTION: Puga shotgun burst pro <style=cIsDamage>6x100% vulnere</style>. Kills <style=cIsUtility>reset omnes tuos cooldowns.</style>
